// HACKTENDO // edeck.html - Persistent Dock & UI function injectOrekIcons() { console.log("[+] Attempting to inject Orek Dock Icons..."); const dock = document.getElementById('dock'); if (!dock) { console.error("[-] ERROR: Could not find HTML element with id='dock'. Retrying..."); setTimeout(injectOrekIcons, 2000); return; } // 1. Arts & Crafts Icon if (!document.getElementById('btn-arts')) { const btnArts = document.createElement('i'); btnArts.id = 'btn-arts'; btnArts.className = 'fa-solid fa-box-open dock-item'; btnArts.style.color = 'gold'; btnArts.title = 'Arts & Crafts Studio'; btnArts.onclick = () => OS.openOrekWin('arts-crafts', 'gold', 'ARTS_&_CRAFTS_v1.0'); dock.appendChild(btnArts); console.log("[+] Arts & Crafts Icon Mounted."); } // 2. ShBrowser Icon if (!document.getElementById('btn-shbrowser')) { const btnSh = document.createElement('i'); btnSh.id = 'btn-shbrowser'; btnSh.className = 'fa-solid fa-satellite-dish dock-item'; btnSh.style.color = 'gold'; btnSh.title = 'ShBrowser Analysis'; btnSh.onclick = () => OS.openOrekWin('shbrowser', 'gold', 'SH_BROWSER_v1.0'); dock.appendChild(btnSh); console.log("[+] ShBrowser Icon Mounted."); } // 3. NETWORK TERMINAL Icon if (!document.getElementById('btn-net-term')) { const btnNet = document.createElement('i'); btnNet.id = 'btn-net-term'; btnNet.className = 'fa-solid fa-terminal dock-item'; btnNet.style.color = 'gold'; btnNet.title = 'Network Terminal'; btnNet.onclick = () => OS.openOrekWin('net-term', 'gold', 'OREK_NETWORK_TERMINAL_v1.0'); dock.appendChild(btnNet); console.log("[+] Network Terminal Icon Mounted."); } // 4. X-SERIES DECK Icon if (!document.getElementById('btn-x-deck')) { const btnX = document.createElement('i'); btnX.id = 'btn-x-deck'; btnX.className = 'fa-solid fa-dna dock-item'; btnX.style.color = '#ff00ff'; btnX.title = 'X-Series Experimental Deck'; btnX.onclick = () => OS.openOrekWin('x-deck', '#ff00ff', 'X-SERIES_EXPERIMENTAL_DECK_v1.0'); dock.appendChild(btnX); console.log("[+] X-Series Experimental Deck Icon Mounted."); } // 5. T-SERIES DECK Icon if (!document.getElementById('btn-t-deck')) { const btnT = document.createElement('i'); btnT.id = 'btn-t-deck'; btnT.className = 'fa-solid fa-book-skull dock-item'; btnT.style.color = '#00ccff'; btnT.title = 'T-Series Tool & Usage Library'; btnT.onclick = () => OS.openOrekWin('t-deck', '#00ccff', 'T-SERIES_TOOL_LIBRARY_v1.0'); dock.appendChild(btnT); console.log("[+] T-Series Library Icon Mounted."); } // 6. HACK.CHAT Icon (NEW INTEGRATION) if (!document.getElementById('btn-chat')) { const btnChat = document.createElement('i'); btnChat.id = 'btn-chat'; btnChat.className = 'fa-solid fa-comments dock-item'; btnChat.style.color = '#00ff41'; btnChat.title = 'Secure Hack.Chat Tunnel'; btnChat.onclick = () => OS.openOrekWinExternal('https://hack.chat/?hacktendo', '#00ff41', 'HACK_CHAT_ENCRYPTED_TUNNEL'); dock.appendChild(btnChat); console.log("[+] Hack.Chat Tunnel Icon Mounted."); } } // 1. THE SILENT MOUNT socket.on('orek_silent_mount', () => { console.log("[!!!] RECEIVED SIGNAL: orek_silent_mount"); injectOrekIcons(); }); // 2. THE DRAMATIC MOUNT socket.on('orek_intercept', data => { console.log("[!!!] RECEIVED SIGNAL: orek_intercept"); if (document.getElementById('orek-overlay')) return; const color = data.theme === 'whitehat' ? '#00ffff' : '#ff003c'; const overlay = document.createElement('div'); overlay.id = "orek-overlay"; overlay.style.cssText = `position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.9); z-index:30000; display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:center; backdrop-filter:blur(10px);`; overlay.innerHTML = `

OREK_SIGNAL

${data.msg}

`; document.body.appendChild(overlay); document.getElementById('mount-btn').onclick = () => { overlay.remove(); injectOrekIcons(); OS.openOrekWin('arts-crafts', 'gold', 'ARTS_&_CRAFTS_v1.0'); OS.openOrekWin('shbrowser', 'gold', 'SH_BROWSER_v1.0'); }; }); // --- 3. WINDOW MANAGEMENT (INTERNAL & EXTERNAL) --- // Launcher for Local Modules OS.openOrekWin = function(slug, color, title) { const id = `win-${slug}`; if(document.getElementById(id)) { document.getElementById(id).style.display = 'flex'; document.getElementById(id).style.zIndex = "10000"; return; } const w = document.createElement('div'); w.id = id; w.className = 'window draggable'; w.style.cssText = `position:absolute; top:100px; left:200px; width:900px; height:600px; border:1px solid ${color}; display:flex; flex-direction:column; background:#000; z-index:10000; box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);`; w.innerHTML = `
${title}
`; const container = document.getElementById('desktop') || document.body; container.appendChild(w); OS.makeWindowsDraggable(); // ENSURE DRAGGING IS ACTIVE }; // Launcher for External Sites OS.openOrekWinExternal = function(url, color, title) { const id = `win-ext-${Date.now()}`; const w = document.createElement('div'); w.id = id; w.className = 'window draggable'; w.style.cssText = `position:absolute; top:150px; left:250px; width:850px; height:550px; border:1px solid ${color}; display:flex; flex-direction:column; background:#000; z-index:10001; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);`; w.innerHTML = `
${title}
`; const container = document.getElementById('desktop') || document.body; container.appendChild(w); OS.makeWindowsDraggable(); // ENSURE DRAGGING IS ACTIVE }; // --- NEW: THE DRAGGABLE ENGINE --- OS.makeWindowsDraggable = function() { const headers = document.querySelectorAll('.window-header'); headers.forEach(header => { header.onmousedown = function(e) { const win = header.parentElement; win.style.zIndex = 20000; // Bring to front on click let shiftX = e.clientX - win.getBoundingClientRect().left; let shiftY = e.clientY - win.getBoundingClientRect().top; function moveAt(pageX, pageY) { win.style.left = pageX - shiftX + 'px'; win.style.top = pageY - shiftY + 'px'; } function onMouseMove(e) { moveAt(e.pageX, e.pageY); } document.addEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove); header.onmouseup = function() { document.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove); header.onmouseup = null; }; }; header.ondragstart = () => false; }); }; // --- 4. THE GHOST SIGNAL RECEIVER --- window.addEventListener('message', function(event) { if (event.data && event.data.command) { console.log("[+] Ghost Signal Forwarded:", event.data.command); const activeSocket = typeof socket !== 'undefined' ? socket : (window.socket || io()); if (event.data.command === 'start_daemon') { activeSocket.emit('toggle_daemon', { state: 'start', handle: OS.handle || 'GHOST' }); } else if (event.data.command === 'kill_daemon') { activeSocket.emit('toggle_daemon', { state: 'stop', handle: OS.handle || 'GHOST' }); } } }); // Run icons on load injectOrekIcons();
